items.title: 2026 City Council Referral Prioritization Results Using Re-Weighted Range
items.action: 3 speakers. M/S/C (Lunaparra/Taplin) to adopt Resolution No. 72,120–N.S. approving the list of prioritized referrals to city staff. Vote: Ayes – Taplin, Tregub, O’Keefe, Lunaparra, Humbert, Ishii; Noes – None; Abstain – None; Absent – Kesarwani, Bartlett, Blackaby. Adjournment Action: M/S/C (Tregub/

items.title: Presentation submitted by the City Clerk Department
